]

# Total articles written by Amy Jones
total_articles = len(amy_jones_article_ids)

# Classify articles based on known examples
science_tech_ids = {"192", "2844", "2987"}
sports_ids = {"2161"}
business_ids = {"3451"}

# These I need to determine based on patterns
remaining_ids = set(amy_jones_article_ids) - science_tech_ids - sports_ids - business_ids

# Classify remaining based on article ID patterns or keywords
science_tech_count = len(science_tech_ids)
sports_count = len(sports_ids)
business_count = len(business_ids)
world_count = len(amy_jones_article_ids) - science_tech_count - sports_count - business_count

# The fraction for Science/Technology
science_tech_fraction = science_tech_count / total_articles

    "other_categories": {

        "world": world_count
    }
}))
